description_long: This is a large, modern cabinet with a minimalist design, featuring three tall, flat doors that span the full height of the unit. The exterior is finished in a smooth, light-colored material, likely a painted or laminated wood, giving it a clean and contemporary appearance. The cabinet stands on small, barely visible feet, elevating it slightly off the ground. There are no visible handles, suggesting the doors may be opened by a push-to-open mechanism or integrated grooves. The top and sides are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the sleek, geometric form. This type of cabinet is suitable for urban environments such as offices, lobbies, or residential entryways, providing ample concealed storage.
description: A large, sleek, light-colored cabinet with three tall doors and a minimalist, handle-free design. Its smooth surfaces and modern style make it suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's depth and flat, unadorned side panel.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three tall, flat doors with subtle vertical grooves and no visible handles.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the cabinet's depth and plain side panel.
description_view_3: Rear or alternate front view, showing the three-panel design and small feet at the base.
